flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at College of Saint Benedict rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 ($50.1k → $55.8k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at College of Saint Benedict rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 ($50.1k → $55.8k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at College of Saint Benedict fell 11% between 2021 and 2024 (1.5k → 1.4k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at College of Saint Benedict fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (0.2% → 0.0%).
